title: caopia petiolata
side_effects: Caopia petiolata can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and headaches in some individuals. Overconsumption of the plant's extracts can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, stomach cramps, and vomiting. In severe cases, prolonged use or high doses of the plant can cause respiratory problems, allergic reactions, and even interact negatively with certain medications. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using Caopia petiolata for any health purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
